import('/src/v4/kanban.js').then(({ initKanban }) => { initKanban(); // Wire the page-action New card button to open the editor with no preset. document.getElementById('kanban-add-btn').addEventListener('click', (e) => { e.stopPropagation(); e.preventDefault(); document.querySelector('.kanban-add[data-add-col="todo"]')?.click(); }); });
